title.zh: Google 发布 Gemini 企业级 Agent 平台
title.en: Google Unveils Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform

desc.zh: 在 Google Cloud Next 大会上，Sundar Pichai 宣布推出 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform，帮助企业大规模构建和管理 AI Agent，支持 Claude Opus 等第三方模型，直接对标 Amazon Bedrock AgentCore 和 Microsoft Foundry。
desc.en: At Google Cloud Next, Sundar Pichai announced Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform for building and managing AI agents at enterprise scale, with support for third-party models like Claude Opus, competing with Amazon and Microsoft's enterprise agent tools.

title.zh: Microsoft 发布三款多模态基础模型
title.en: Microsoft Releases Three Foundational Multimodal Models

desc.zh: Microsoft AI 实验室发布 MAI-Transcribe-1（语音转录）、MAI-Voice-1（语音生成）和 MAI-Image-2（视频生成），由 Mustafa Suleyman 领导的团队开发，价格比 Google 和 OpenAI 更低。
desc.en: Microsoft AI lab released MAI-Transcribe-1, MAI-Voice-1, and MAI-Image-2, developed by Mustafa Suleyman's team. The models are positioned as cheaper alternatives to Google and OpenAI offerings.

title.zh: Arcee 开源 400B 参数推理模型 Trinity

desc.zh: 仅 26 人的美国初创公司 Arcee 以 2000 万美元预算训练出 4000 亿参数开源模型 Trinity Large Thinking，采用 Apache 2.0 许可证，旨在为西方企业提供中国开源模型之外的替代选择。
desc.en: 26-person startup Arcee built a 400B-parameter open-source reasoning model on a $20M budget, released under Apache 2.0, positioning it as a Western alternative to Chinese open-source models.

title.zh: Anthropic 发布 Claude Mythos 网络安全专用模型
title.en: Anthropic Launches Claude Mythos Cybersecurity Model

desc.zh: Anthropic 推出专为网络安全设计的 Claude Mythos Preview，已被 Nvidia、Apple 和 JPMorgan Chase 等大型企业采用，用于自动发现和修复高危系统漏洞。
desc.en: Anthropic launched Claude Mythos Preview, a cybersecurity-focused AI model now used by Nvidia, Apple, and JPMorgan Chase to autonomously discover and patch critical system vulnerabilities.

title.zh: OpenAI 完成 1220 亿美元融资，周活用户达 9 亿
title.en: OpenAI Closes $122B Round, Hits 900M Weekly Users

desc.zh: OpenAI 最新私募融资由 Amazon、Nvidia、Softbank 和 Microsoft 参投，估值飙升。同时宣布结束视频生成器 Sora，转向构建集成 ChatGPT、Codex 和 Agent 的统一超级应用。
desc.en: OpenAI closed a $122B private funding round with Amazon, Nvidia, Softbank, and Microsoft. It also announced sunsetting video generator Sora to focus on a unified superapp integrating ChatGPT, Codex, and agents.

title.zh: Hacker News 明确禁止 AI 生成评论
title.en: Hacker News Explicitly Bans AI-Generated Comments

desc.zh: Hacker News 更新社区指南，明确规定禁止发布由 LLM 生成或经 AI 编辑的评论，强调平台是用于人类之间真实对话的场所。该公告获得超过 4200 个点赞和 1600 条讨论。
desc.en: Hacker News updated guidelines to ban LLM-generated or AI-edited comments, emphasizing the platform is for genuine human conversation. The announcement received 4,200+ upvotes and 1,600 comments.

title.zh: Meta 重申开源 AI 是行业前进方向
title.en: Meta Reaffirms Open Source AI as the Path Forward

desc.zh: Meta 发布官方博客阐述开源 AI 的战略价值，认为开放模型能加速创新、提升安全性，并避免 AI 权力过度集中。该文章在技术社区 Hacker News 获得 2300+ 点赞。
desc.en: Meta's official blog detailed the strategic value of open-source AI, arguing it accelerates innovation, improves safety, and prevents excessive concentration of AI power. The post gained 2,300+ upvotes on HN.

title.zh: SoftBank 成立物理 AI 公司，Sony 与 Honda 参与
title.en: SoftBank Launches Physical AI Firm with Sony and Honda

desc.zh: SoftBank 创建新公司研发能自主控制机器和机器人的物理 AI 模型，目标 2030 年实现。Sony、Honda 和日本制铁参与合作，被视为日本抗衡中美 AI 竞争的重要布局。
desc.en: SoftBank created a new company to develop physical AI models that autonomously control machines and robots by 2030. Sony, Honda, and Nippon Steel are partnering in what Japan sees as a key move to compete with US and Chinese AI.
